creator: cperciva@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for reporting these.  The bufwait/dirhash LOR is a known false positive,
and the ufs/bufwait/ufs LOR is something I see very frequently; either it's a
false positive or it's otherwise very unlikely to cause problems given how many
people see it and don't encounter problems.

These two were both reported in PR kern/138002 (and probably other PRs too) so
I'm going to close this PR as a duplicate.

-- 
Colin Percival
Security Officer, FreeBSD | freebsd.org | The power to serve
Founder / author, Tarsnap | tarsnap.com | Online backups for the truly paranoid
